card_faces.name: Adventurous Eater
card_faces.oracle_text: This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)

card_faces.name: Have a Bite
card_faces.oracle_text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. You gain 1 life.

name: Ajani's Response
oracle_text:
This spell costs {3} less to cast if it targets a tapped creature.
Destroy target creature.
flavor_text: Ajani no longer wanted to swing his axe in battle, but nothing came easier to him than defending those who needed protection.

name: Ancestral Anger
oracle_text:
Target creature gains trample and gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is 1 plus the number of cards named Ancestral Anger in your graveyard.
Draw a card.
flavor_text: An incautious Lorehold student may learn more about the unbound rage of the Blood Age than they wanted to.

name: Ascendant Dustspeaker
oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature you control.
At the beginning of combat on your turn, exile up to one target card from a graveyard.
flavor_text: You can always tell who just left Professor Osgir's lecture on practical restoration.

name: Banishing Betrayal
oracle_text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
flavor_text: One simple push and Jadzi fell into the churning swirl of magic. Tam thought it would be harder—wished that it had been harder.

name: Biblioplex Tomekeeper
oracle_text:
When this creature enters, choose up to one —
• Target creature becomes prepared. (Only creatures with prepare spells can become prepared.)
• Target creature becomes unprepared.
flavor_text: "Due dates are firm, and will be enforced."

name: Bogwater Lumaret
oracle_text: Whenever this creature or another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life.
flavor_text:
"You will hear rumors that licking lumarets grants prophetic visions. That is untrue. Please refrain from licking the lumarets."
—Witherbloom student handbook

name: Burrog Banemaker
oracle_text:
Deathtouch
{1}{B}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
flavor_text: In most colleges, Erren's poisonous skin would have made them a pariah. In Witherbloom, they were one of the most popular students on campus.

name: Burrog Barrage
oracle_text: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn if you've cast another instant or sorcery spell this turn. Then it deals damage equal to its power to up to one target creature an opponent controls.
flavor_text: "I had to leave Doradur to attend Strixhaven, so I brought a piece of home with me."

name: Chase Inspiration
oracle_text: Target creature you control gets +0/+3 and gains hexproof until end of turn. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)
flavor_text: Nothing gets in the way of a Prismari student following a great idea.

card_faces.name: Cheerful Osteomancer
card_faces.oracle_text: This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)

card_faces.name: Raise Dead
card_faces.oracle_text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

name: Cost of Brilliance
oracle_text: Target player draws two cards and loses 2 life. Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature.
flavor_text:
"There will be moments when you are exhausted, with nothing left to give. Remember them when you finally succeed."
—Embrose, dean of shadow

name: Deluge Virtuoso
oracle_text:
When this creature enters, tap target creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)
Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, this creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn instead.

name: Dig Site Inventory
oracle_text:
Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains vigilance until end of turn.
Flashback {W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
flavor_text: "I checked my pack twice before we left campus. So why do I feel like I forgot something?"

name: Eager Glyphmage
oracle_text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white and black Inkling creature token with flying.
flavor_text: Sharrel poured his heart into his words and watched them take flight.

name: Efflorescence
oracle_text:
Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature.
Infusion — If you gained life this turn, that creature also gains trample and indestructible until end of turn.
flavor_text:
"Wherever your foot falls, life blossoms in its wake."
—Lisette, dean of the root

name: Elemental Mascot
oracle_text:
Flying, vigilance
Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until the end of your next turn.
flavor_text: It soars in the presence of true beauty.

card_faces.name: Elite Interceptor
card_faces.oracle_text: This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)

card_faces.name: Rejoinder
card_faces.oracle_text:
You may tap or untap target creature.
Draw a card.

name: Embrace the Paradox
oracle_text: Draw three cards. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.
flavor_text:
"Every lecture you attended—every theorem you memorized and equation you solved—has led to this first step into uncertainty."
—Professor Deekah

name: Essence Scatter
oracle_text: Counter target creature spell.
flavor_text:
"Venturing beyond campus means learning how to deal with creatures not bound by university rules."
—Emil, Vastlands roamer

name: Expressive Firedancer
oracle_text: Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, this creature also gains double strike until end of turn.
flavor_text:
"Now, let your movements respond to the music! Yes, just like that!"
—Introduction to Interpretation

name: Fields of Strife
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {R} or {W}.
{2}{R}{W}, {T}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
flavor_text: The terrible Blood Age lives on in the unending battle between thousands of spirits trapped in their final moments.

name: Follow the Lumarets
oracle_text: Infusion — Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. If you gained life this turn, you may instead reveal two creature and/or land cards from among them and put them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

name: Forum of Amity
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.
{2}{W}{B}, {T}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
flavor_text: A sprawling edifice dedicated to promoting and protecting the fragile peace that holds Arcavios together.

name: Fractal Mascot
oracle_text:
Trample
When this creature enters, tap target creature an opponent controls. Put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)
flavor_text: The nature of theory given form and function.

name: Glorious Decay
oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Destroy target artifact.
• Glorious Decay deals 4 damage to target creature with flying.
• Exile target card from a graveyard. Draw a card.

card_faces.name: Goblin Glasswright
card_faces.oracle_text: This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)

card_faces.name: Craft with Pride
card_faces.oracle_text: Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

name: Grapple with Death
oracle_text: Destroy target artifact or creature. You gain 1 life.
flavor_text: Not until Lluwen watched Professor Fel in action did he truly understand just how closely life and death were intertwined.

name: Heated Argument
oracle_text: Heated Argument deals 6 damage to target creature. You may exile a card from your graveyard. If you do, Heated Argument also deals 2 damage to that creature's controller.
flavor_text: "I don't want to hurt you, Ajani, but whatever Jace is planning needs to be stopped!"

card_faces.name: Honorbound Page
card_faces.oracle_text:
First strike
This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)

card_faces.name: Forum's Favor
card_faces.oracle_text: Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains flying until end of turn.

name: Hungry Graffalon
oracle_text:
Reach
Increment (Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana you spent is greater than this creature's power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.)
flavor_text: The nature of the Paradox Gardens is such that the beasts that live there are always exactly as tall as they need to be to get a snack.

name: Hydro-Channeler
oracle_text:
{T}: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast an instant or sorcery spell.
{1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast an instant or sorcery spell.
flavor_text: Only when they can defy the laws of nature can a Quandrix student claim to have mastered a spell.

name: Imperious Inkmage
oracle_text:
Vigilance
When this creature enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)
flavor_text: "It's not ego if you're flawless, darling."

name: Inkling Mascot
oracle_text: Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, this creature gains flying until end of turn. Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
flavor_text: At the ready when words fail.

name: Interjection
oracle_text: Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains first strike until end of turn.
flavor_text: Silverquill professors dislike when students disrupt their lessons, but can't help approving of the confidence needed to do so.

card_faces.name: Landscape Painter
card_faces.oracle_text: This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)

name: Last Gasp
oracle_text: Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.
flavor_text:
"A reminder, students, that those of you unlucky enough to have lungs must mask up for this assignment."
—Moseo, dean of the vein

name: Mage Tower Referee
oracle_text: Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
flavor_text: Incapable of choosing a favorite and invulnerable to the influence of magic, it is an ideal and obnoxiously accurate referee.

name: Masterful Flourish
oracle_text: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)
flavor_text: "Hold your applause. I am not yet finished."

name: Melancholic Poet
oracle_text: Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
flavor_text: "We celebrate our sadness because it reminds us of the true value of being alive."

name: Mindful Biomancer
oracle_text:
When this creature enters, you gain 1 life.
{2}{G}: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.
flavor_text: "I sometimes think I've learned more from the smallest of beings than from all of my professors combined."

name: Muse's Encouragement
oracle_text:
Create a 3/3 blue and red Elemental creature token with flying.
Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)
flavor_text: Many Prismari students find their best ideas while under the gaze of the Muse.

name: Noxious Newt
oracle_text:
Deathtouch
{T}: Add {G}.
flavor_text: Brightly-colored skin doesn't always mean a creature is poisonous, but why take the risk?

name: Oracle's Restoration
oracle_text: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. You draw a card and gain 1 life.
flavor_text: Though the archaic had ravaged Titan's Grave and stolen Jadzi from safety, her compassion soothed its frenzy.

name: Owlin Historian
oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

name: Page, Loose Leaf
oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
Grandeur — Discard another card named Page, Loose Leaf: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an instant or sorcery card. Put that card into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

name: Paradox Gardens
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {G} or {U}.
{2}{G}{U}, {T}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
flavor_text: A vast expanse that alters the rules of nature, offering a glimpse into the very structure of reality.

name: Pest Mascot
oracle_text:
Trample
Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
flavor_text: Hungering for the zest of life.

name: Potioner's Trove
oracle_text:
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
{T}: You gain 2 life. Activate only if you've cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn.
flavor_text: The shops of Ribtruss Town sell anything that can be gathered within Titan's Grave. Just don't ask where they acquired their goods.

name: Procrastinate
oracle_text: Tap target creature. Put twice X stun counters on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)
flavor_text: "None of these projects are due until end of semester. I've still got a whole week to finish them!"

name: Pterafractyl
oracle_text:
Flying
This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it.
When this creature enters, you gain 2 life.
flavor_text:
"Be careful when traversing the Paradox Gardens. Not all experiments are perfectly contained."
—Professor Berta

name: Pull from the Grave
oracle_text: Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand. You gain 2 life.
flavor_text:
"A little bruised, a little broken, but at least no longer dead."
—Dina

name: Pursue the Past
oracle_text:
You gain 2 life. You may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards.
Flashback {2}{R}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
flavor_text:
"Stones in your path are not obstacles, but discoveries."
—Velomachus Lorehold

name: Quick Study
oracle_text: Draw two cards.
flavor_text:
"Even the most familiar formulae can yield unexpected outcomes."
—Professor Ruxa

name: Rancorous Archaic
oracle_text:
Trample, reach
Converge — This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each color of mana spent to cast it.
flavor_text: As the giant shadow loomed, the Forum of Amity fell silent for the first time in its history.

name: Rapier Wit
oracle_text:
Tap target creature. If it's your turn, put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)
Draw a card.
flavor_text: "I make promises, not threats."

name: Rearing Embermare
oracle_text: Reach, haste
flavor_text:
"Terrible creatures. A restorer's worst enemy is fire."
—Osgir, the Reconstructor

name: Rehearsed Debater
oracle_text:
Vigilance
Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
flavor_text: "Of course I talk to myself. Who wouldn't want to hear me speak?"

name: Render Speechless
oracle_text:
Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card.
Put two +1/+1 counters on up to one target creature.
flavor_text: "Seems like I took the words right out of your mouth."

name: Rubble Rouser
oracle_text:
When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.
{T}, Exile a card from your graveyard: Add {R}. When you do, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.
flavor_text: "History is patient. I am not."

name: Run Behind
oracle_text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast if it targets an attacking creature.
Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library.
flavor_text: The skycoach waits for no one.

name: Seize the Spoils
oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card.
Draw two cards and create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
flavor_text: The annual arts festival, Summitfest, draws participants from across Arcavios, but only one will walk away with The Grand Muse trophy.

name: Send in the Pest
oracle_text: Each opponent discards a card. You create a 1/1 black and green Pest creature token with "Whenever this token attacks, you gain 1 life."
flavor_text: Dara couldn't cover her Silverquill bullies in ink but she could do the next best thing.

name: Shattered Acolyte
oracle_text:
Lifelink
{1}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.
flavor_text: "Just because Extus is gone doesn't mean the rest of us disappeared. We are here, and we are still seeking answers."

name: Shopkeeper's Bane
oracle_text:
Trample
Whenever this creature attacks, you gain 2 life.
flavor_text:
"Pests really live up to their name!"
—Annia, disgruntled Ribtruss Town merchant

name: Sneering Shadewriter
oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
flavor_text:
"The whole display was uninspired and derivative, and left me wondering: what was the point?"
— *Strixhaven Star* gallery show review

name: Spectacle Summit
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {U} or {R}.
{2}{U}{R}, {T}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
flavor_text: Shaped by both its own wild nature and the magic of visiting artists, the Muse and the surrounding landscape are a wonder to behold.

Flying
This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)

card_faces.name: Careful Study
card_faces.oracle_text: Draw two cards, then discard two cards.

name: Spirit Mascot
oracle_text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
flavor_text: Unflagging, unafraid, and undaunted.

name: Stadium Tidalmage
oracle_text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.
flavor_text: The Prismari team takes the direction to "flood the zone" literally.

name: Stone Docent
oracle_text: {W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: You gain 2 life. Surveil 1. Activate only as a sorcery. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
flavor_text:
"For those who might consider cheating, its eyes can see everything. That includes you, Esme. Please see me after class."
—Professor Ghostforge

card_faces.name: Strife Scholar
card_faces.oracle_text:
Ward—Pay 2 life.
This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)

card_faces.oracle_text: Create two 2/2 red and white Spirit creature tokens.

card_faces.oracle_text: This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)

card_faces.oracle_text: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

name: Tackle Artist
oracle_text:
Trample
Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, put two +1/+1 counters on this creature instead.
flavor_text: "Let's paint the field red!"

name: Tenured Concocter
oracle_text:
Vigilance
Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, you may draw a card.
Infusion — This creature gets +2/+0 as long as you gained life this turn.
flavor_text: "Potential can be augmented. Imagination cannot."

name: Terramorphic Expanse
oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
flavor_text: Some say this snarl—the most turbulent, changeable location in all of Arcavios—is the birthplace of the five elder dragons. There are also whispers it's where they are destined to die.

name: Textbook Tabulator
oracle_text:
Increment (Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana you spent is greater than this creature's power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.)
When this creature enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

name: Titan's Grave
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {B} or {G}.
{2}{B}{G}, {T}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
flavor_text: From the scattered skeleton of an ancient death grow the secrets of healing and prolonging life—or quietly ending it.

name: Tome Blast
oracle_text:
Tome Blast deals 2 damage to any target.
Flashback {4}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
flavor_text: "You're history."

name: Ulna Alley Shopkeep
oracle_text:
Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
Infusion — This creature gets +2/+0 as long as you gained life this turn.
flavor_text: "This one's from my private stock."

name: Unsubtle Mockery
oracle_text: Unsubtle Mockery deals 4 damage to target creature. Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
flavor_text:
"He said it was 'physically impossible' to capture an exact likeness. The technique could use a little work, but I got the expression right."
—Isobel, hot-headed artist

name: Visionary's Dance
oracle_text:
Create two 3/3 blue and red Elemental creature tokens with flying.
{2}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.
flavor_text: Choreography powers the spell, but improvisation shapes it.

name: Wander Off
oracle_text: Exile target creature.
flavor_text:
"This place may be the Titan's Grave, but if you aren't careful it can be yours as well."
—Professor Dellian Fel

name: Wild Hypothesis
oracle_text:
Create a 0/0 green and blue Fractal creature token. Put X +1/+1 counters on it.
Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

name: Wilt in the Heat
oracle_text:
This spell costs {2} less to cast if one or more cards left your graveyard this turn.
Wilt in the Heat deals 5 damage to target creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.
flavor_text: "'It'll be fun,' they said. 'The Fields are full of dead things,' they said."

name: Zealous Lorecaster
oracle_text: When this creature enters, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.
flavor_text: "Sometimes the only way to learn from history is by repeating it."
